entries.source: "Ask Ambedkar about democracy"
entries.value: "Cuir ceist ar Ambedkar faoin daonlathas"

entries.source: "Meet Ada Lovelace"
entries.value: "Buail le Ada Lovelace"

entries.source: "Talk to Cleopatra"
entries.value: "Labhair le Cleopatra"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Talk to a historical person on inspir for immersion learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: Treoir phraiticiúil ar Talk to a historical person a úsáid ar inspir le haghaidh foghlaim thumthach, le prasaí, lúba staidéir, agus nósanna IS níos sábháilte.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: Lúb staidéir níos láidre

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: Teagascóir IS

entries.source: Ask better questions.
entries.value: Cuir ceisteanna níos fearr.

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Iarr céad chéim bheag seachas freagra deiridh.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Iarr ar an IS do réasúnaíocht a sheiceáil, ní an toradh amháin.

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Críochnaigh trí an smaoineamh a scríobh ar ais ó chuimhne.

entries.source: Immersion
entries.value: Tumadh

entries.source: Learners who want to understand people, choices, and ideas in historical context.
entries.value: Foghlaimeoirí atá ag iarraidh daoine, roghanna agus smaointe a thuiscint i gcomhthéacs stairiúil.

entries.source: Meet a figure.
entries.value: Buail le figiúr.

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Prasaí le triail

entries.source: Start the live mode at Talk to a historical person. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Debate with a personality. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Tosaigh an mód beo ag Talk to a historical person. Más mian leat formáid foghlama chomharsanachta, bain triail as Debate with a personality. Le haghaidh léargas níos leithne ar an ardán, léigh cad ba chóir do chompánach foghlama IS a dhéanamh do chách.

entries.source: Talk to a historical person
entries.value: Labhair le duine stairiúil

entries.source: Talk To Historical Figures With AI is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Step into conversation with a historical figure. Ask questions, challenge ideas, and hear the world through their era, values, and limits.
entries.value: Is bealach dírithe é Labhair le Figiúirí Stairiúla le IS chun IS a úsáid don fhoghlaim seachas bailiú freagraí éighníomhach. Tá an mód tógtha timpeall ar phost ar leith: céim isteach i gcomhrá le figiúr stairiúil. Cuir ceisteanna, tabhair dúshlán do smaointe, agus cloisteáil an domhan trína ré, luachanna, agus teorainneacha.

entries.source: Talk To Historical Figures With AI: practical guide
entries.value: Labhair le Figiúirí Stairiúla le IS: treoir phraiticiúil

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Inis don mhód cad atá tú ag iarraidh a fhoghlaim nó a tháirgeadh.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: Taispeánann an difríocht sin í féin sa sreabhadh. In ionad freagra ollmhór amháin, bogann na seisiúin is fearr trí lúb: socraigh sprioc, bain triail as rud éigin, faigh aiseolas, deisigh an pointe lag, agus roghnaigh an chéad ghníomh eile.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: Tá an fócas sin tábhachtach. Is féidir le chatbot ginearálta beagnach aon rud a fhreagairt, ach tugann mód foghlama cruth don chomhrá. Spreagann sé thú i dtreo an chineáil smaointeoireachta, cleachtaidh, aiseolais, nó fiosraithe a chabhraíonn leis an smaoineamh fanacht.

entries.source: The app separates in-character conversation from short context notes about records and uncertainty.
entries.value: Scarann an aip comhrá sa charachtar ó nótaí comhthéacs gairide faoi thaifid agus éiginnteacht.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: Is é seo an nós céanna taobh thiar de staidéar le IS gan caimiléireacht a dhéanamh ort féin: coinnigh an foghlaimeoir gníomhach. Is úsáidí IS nuair a thugann sí aiseolas ar do smaointeoireacht.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: Tá an mód seo thar a bheith úsáideach d’fhoghlaimeoirí ar mian leo:

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: Bain triail as an gcéim i d’fhocail féin.

entries.source: Understand the era.
entries.value: Tuig an ré.

entries.source: Use Talk to a historical person when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Úsáid Talk to a historical person nuair atá seisiún uait a thosaíonn go tapa ach a oiriúnaíonn duit fós. Ní hé an chéad sprioc fuaimniú go hiontach. Is é an chéad sprioc an chéad chéim eile a dhéanamh indéanta.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: Cad leis a gcabhraíonn an mód seo

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: Cá háit le dul ina dhiaidh sin

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Is féidir leat tosú freisin le leagan garbh de d’fhadhb fhíor. Tá céad phras míshlachtmhar ceart go leor. Is féidir leis an seisiún an leibhéal, an lucht féachana, an spriocdháta, agus an stíl a shoiléiriú nuair a thosaíonn tú.
